features: 【Package Contents】: You will receive 5 rolls of Raffia Ribbon Bundles, 50g per roll, in quantities sufficient to meet your needs
【Quality Materials】: The Brown Raffia Ribbon is made from high quality natural raffia for a soft texture, natural colour and durability
【 DIY Crafting 】: Raffia Ribbon Grass can be cut to fit. You can use it for crafts with the kids or to spruce up the look of greeting cards and artwork
【Multipurpose】: Raffia bundles perfect for crafts, package decoration, weaving. It can be used for various DIY braided fillings, such as hand straps, coasters, storage baskets, etc
【After Sales Service】: Our products provide you with unrivalled quality. If you have any related product information, you can contact us by email
